policy.title: Privacy Policy
policy.section: We collect your name, email address, professional details, and usage data to provide and improve the SonoSchool platform.
Your data is used to manage your account, deliver courses, issue certificates, and send service communications. We never sell personal data to third parties.
Account data is retained for as long as your account is active. You may request deletion at any time by contacting hello@sonoschool.com.
We use essential cookies for authentication and analytics cookies (opt-in) to improve the platform experience.
For privacy enquiries contact our Data Protection Officer at privacy@sonoschool.com.

policy.title: Terms of Service
policy.section: By registering on SonoSchool you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the platform.
You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your credentials. Sharing account access is prohibited.
All course content, videos, and materials are the intellectual property of SonoSchool and may not be reproduced without written permission.
Certificates are issued upon successful completion of assessments. Fraudulent activity will result in revocation and account termination.
SonoSchool provides educational content only. Clinical decisions remain the sole responsibility of the treating physician.

policy.title: Refund Policy
policy.section: Full refund within 7 days of purchase, provided less than 20% of the course has been completed.
Cancellations made more than 14 days before the event receive a full refund. Within 14 days, a 50% refund applies. No refund within 48 hours.
Email refunds@sonoschool.com with your order number and reason. Requests are processed within 5–10 business days.

policy.title: Accreditation Policy
policy.section: All SonoSchool programmes are designed to meet or exceed EFSUMB and WINFOCUS educational standards.
Accredited courses carry CME/CPD credits recognised in Egypt, Jordan, UAE, Saudi Arabia, and select European countries.
Certificates are valid for 3 years from the date of issue. Recertification courses are available on the platform.
Third parties may verify certificates at sonoschool.com using the certificate ID printed on the document.
